requirements.full_sentence:
44
<image>
Introduction
Securitisation involves transactions where credit risk in assets are redistributed by
repackaging them into tradeable securities with different risk profiles which may give
investors of various classes access to exposures which they otherwise might be
unable to access directly.
requirements.object: classes access to exposures which they otherwise might be unable to access directly

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day these are placed on the
official website of the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: the day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
requirements.object: India Financial Institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these directions, the following definitions apply:
<image>
(1) "bankruptcy remote" means the unlikelihood of an entity being subjected to
voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings, including by the originator or
the creditors to the originator;
requirements.object: entity being subjected to voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings, including by the originator or the creditors to the

conditions:
when the outstanding
value of the underlying exposures falls below a pre-defined threshold
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) "clean-up call" means an option that permits the originator to call the
underlying exposures or the securitisation exposures when the outstanding
value of the underlying exposures falls below a pre-defined threshold, thereby
extinguishing the remaining securitisation exposures of all parties;
requirements.object: the originator to call the underlying exposures or the securitisation exposures when the outstanding value of the underlying ex

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) "credit enhancement" means a contractual arrangement in which an entity
mitigates the credit risk associated with a securitisation exposure and, in
substance, provides some degree of added protection to other parties to the
transaction so as to mitigate the credit risk of their securitisation exposures;
requirements.object: which an entity mitigates the credit risk associated with a securitisation exposure and, in substance, provides some degr

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) "early amortisation provision" means a mechanism that, once triggered,
accelerates the reduction of the investor's interest in underlying exposures of
a securitisation structure and allows investors to be paid out prior to the
originally stated maturity of the securitisation notes issued;
requirements.object: triggered, accelerates the reduction of the investor's interest in underlying exposures of a securitisation structure and allow

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) "excess spread (or future margin income)" means the difference between the
gross finance charge collections and other income received by the special
purpose entity (SPE), and securitisation notes interest, servicing fees, charge-
offs, and other senior SPE expenses.
requirements.object: gross finance charge collections and other income received by the special purpose entity (SPE), and securitisation notes in

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) "exposure amount" of a securitisation exposure means the sum of the on-
balance sheet amount of the exposure, or carrying value - which takes into
account purchase discounts and writedowns/specific provisions the AIFI took
on this securitisation exposure - and the off-balance sheet exposure amount,
where applicable.
requirements.object: on- balance sheet amount of the exposure, or carrying value - which takes into account purchase discounts and writedowns/specific provisions the AIFI took on this securitisation exposure - and the off-balance sheet exposure amount

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) "first loss facility" means the first level of financial support provided by the
originator or a third party to improve the creditworthiness of the securitisation
notes issued by the SPE such that the provider of the facility bears the part or
all of the risks associated with the assets held by the SPE;
requirements.object: financial support provided by the originator or a third party to improve the creditworthiness of the securitisation notes issued by

conditions:
when an AIFI provides support
to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation
requirements.full_sentence:
(8) "implicit support" means the protection arising when an AIFI provides support
to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation;
requirements.object: an AIFI provides support to a securitisation in excess of its predetermined contractual obligation

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Originator may not be the same lender which had initially
sanctioned one or more of the exposures underlying a securitisation
transaction since loans purchased from lenders can also be sold to SPEs for
the purpose of securitisation.
requirements.object: which had initially sanctioned one or more of the exposures underlying a securitisation transaction since loans purchased from lend
enhancement by virtue of which underlying exposures are posted in value which is higher than the value of the securitisation notes

requirements.full_sentence:
(14) "replenishment" means the process of using the cash flows from the
securitised assets to acquire more assets in the manner disclosed upfront in
the prospectus of the scheme, which will continue for a pre-announced
replenishment period, following which the securitisation structure switches to
an amortising one;
requirements.object: the cash flows from the securitised assets to acquire more assets in the manner disclosed upfront in the prospectus of the scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Reserve accounts, such as cash collateral accounts, which is
earmarked to absorb credit losses arising from the securitisation and is
recorded as an asset by the originator must also be treated as securitisation
exposures.
requirements.object: securitisation exposures
effectively backed or secured by a first claim on the entire amount of the assets in the underlying securitised pool

conditions: Provided that where all tranches above the first-loss piece are rated
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that where all tranches above the first-loss piece are rated, the most
highly rated position would be treated as a senior tranche.
requirements.object: the first-loss piece are rated, the most highly rated position would be treated as a senior tranche

conditions: Provided that when there are several tranches that share the same rating
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that when there are several tranches that share the same rating,
only the most senior tranche in the cash flow waterfall would be treated as
senior (unless the only difference among them is the effective maturity).
requirements.object: tranches that share the same rating, only the most senior tranche in the cash flow waterfall would be treated as senior (unless

conditions:
when the different ratings of several senior tranches only result
from a difference in maturity
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that when the different ratings of several senior tranches only result
from a difference in maturity, all of these tranches should be treated as senior
tranches.
requirements.object: of several senior tranches only result from a difference in maturity, all of these tranches should be treated as senior tra

requirements.full_sentence:
(23) "special purpose entity (SPE)" means a company, trust or other entity
organised for a specific purpose, the activities of which are limited to those
appropriate to accomplish the purpose of the SPE, and the structure of which
is intended to isolate the SPE from the credit risk of an originator;
requirements.object: other entity organised for a specific purpose, the activities of which are limited to those appropriate to accomplish the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
(24) "subordinate tranche" means any tranche that is junior to the senior
tranche(s);
requirements.object: junior to the senior tranche(s)

conditions:
where credit risk of an
underlying pool of exposures is transferred
requirements.full_sentence:
(25) "synthetic securitisation" means a structure where credit risk of an
underlying pool of exposures is transferred, in whole or in part, through the
use of credit derivatives or credit guarantees that serve to hedge the credit
risk of the portfolio which remains on the balance sheet of the AIFI;
requirements.object: risk of an underlying pool of exposures is transferred, in whole or in part, through the use of credit derivatives or credit

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Securitisation notes issued by the SPE and credit enhancement
facilities available shall be treated as tranches.

requirements.object: or assume securitisation exposures as mentioned below: (1) Re-securitisation exposures

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that loans with tenor up to 24 months extended to individuals
for agricultural activities (as described in Reserve Bank of India (Priority
Sector Lending - Targets and Classification) Directions, 2025) where
both interest and principal are due only on maturity and trade
receivables with tenor up to 12 months discounted/purchased by AIFIs
from their borrowers shall be eligible for securitisation.

In case
such assets are securitised, the investors in the securitisation notes
<image>
issued against them should be able to verify the compliance of the
underlying asset with the above requirement.
requirements.object: the compliance of the underlying asset with the above requirement

requirements.full_sentence:
The originators of such exposures shall have satisfied the Minimum holding
period (MHP) requirement as defined in Reserve Bank of India (All India
Financial Institutions - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions,
2025.
requirements.object: holding period (MHP) requirement as defined in Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Transfer and Distr

conditions: Provided that for commercial or residential real estate mortgages
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for commercial or residential real estate mortgages, MHP shall be
counted from the date of full disbursement of the loan, or registration of security
interest with Central Registry of Securitisation Asset Reconstruction and
Security Interest of India (CERSAI), whichever is later.
requirements.object: date of full disbursement of the loan, or registration of security interest with Central Registry of Securitisation Asset Reconstr

requirements.full_sentence:
The transactions undertaken in terms of these directions must not contravene
the rights of underlying obligors.
requirements.object: underlying obligors

conditions: where necessary as per the respective contracts
requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure compliance with this stipulation,
enabling clauses must be included in the contract between originator and
servicing agent and all necessary consent from obligors (including from third
parties), where necessary as per the respective contracts, should have been
obtained.
requirements.object: contract between originator and servicing agent and all necessary consent from obligors (including from third parties)

requirements.full_sentence:
The originators should
adhere to the MRR as detailed below while securitising loans leading to
issuance of securitisation notes, other than for residential mortgage backed
securities:
(1) For underlying loans with original maturity of 24 months or less, the MRR shall
be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised.
requirements.object: of the book value of the loans being securitised

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) For underlying loans with original maturity of more than 24 months as well as
loans with bullet repayments, as mentioned in proviso to Paragraph 5, the
MRR shall be 10 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised.
requirements.object: of the book value of the loans being securitised

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of residential mortgage backed securities, the MRR for the
originator shall be 5 per cent of the book value of the loans being securitised,
irrespective of the original maturity.
requirements.object: of the book value of the loans being securitised, irrespective of the original maturity

requirements.full_sentence:
The MRR shall be retained by the originator as follows:
(1) Up to 5 per cent of the book value of loans being securitised:
Explanation: It is clarified that first loss facility for this purpose shall not
include overcollateralization available, if any.

MRR should not be reduced either through hedging of credit risk or selling or
encumbering the retained interest.
requirements.object: hedging of credit risk or selling or encumbering the retained interest

requirements.full_sentence:
The form of MRR should not change during the life of
securitisation.
requirements.object: of securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The MRR as a percentage of unamortised principal should be maintained on
an ongoing basis except for reduction of retained exposure due to repayment
or through the absorption of losses.
requirements.object: ongoing basis except for reduction of retained exposure due to repayment or through the absorption of losses

requirements.full_sentence:
Specifically, in cases of securitisations
<image>
featuring replenishment period, MRR should be maintained not only at the
initiation of the securitisation but also at the end of the replenishment period.
requirements.object: at the initiation of the securitisation but also at the end of the replenishment period

requirements.full_sentence:
Underwriting standards for exposures securitised should not be less stringent
than those applied to exposures retained on the balance sheet of the originator.
requirements.object: those applied to exposures retained on the balance sheet of the originator

requirements.full_sentence:
Where underwriting standards change between the loan origination and till all
the claims associated with securitised note are paid-off, the originator should
disclose to the entities having securitisation exposures the timing and purpose
of such changes.
requirements.object: having securitisation exposures the timing and purpose of such changes

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of securitisation of exposures purchased by originator from other
lenders, the requirements applicable for underwriting standards shall apply to
the standards of due diligence process adopted by the originator which may
include verification of sufficiency and consistency of loan origination process of
the lender from whom the exposures were purchased by the originator.
requirements.object: of due diligence process adopted by the originator which may include verification of sufficiency and consistency of loan origin

requirements.full_sentence:
To prevent investors being subjected to unexpected repayment profiles during
the life of a securitisation, the priorities of payments for all liabilities in all
circumstances should be clearly defined at the time of securitisation and
appropriate legal comfort regarding their enforceability should be provided.
requirements.object: the time of securitisation and appropriate legal comfort regarding their enforceability should be provided

requirements.full_sentence:
To help provide investors with full transparency over any changes to the cash
flow waterfall, payment profile or priority of payments that might affect a
securitisation, all triggers affecting the cash flow waterfall, payment profile or
priority of payments of the securitisation should be clearly and fully disclosed in
offer documents and in investor reports, with information in the investor report
that clearly identifies the breach status in respect of expected cash flows to the
note holders, the ability for the breach to be reversed and the consequences of
the breach.
requirements.object: disclosed in offer documents and in investor reports, with information in the investor report that clearly identifies the breach

requirements.full_sentence:
Securitisations featuring a replenishment period should include provisions for
appropriate early amortisation events and/or triggers of termination of the
replenishment period, including, notably:
(1) deterioration in the credit quality of the underlying exposures;
requirements.object: early amortisation events and/or triggers of termination of the replenishment period, including, notably: (1) deter

requirements.full_sentence:
In the event actions of associated institutional stakeholders (originator, SPE,
servicing agent, credit enhancement provider and others) that are not prohibited
in this framework, result in material alteration of the risk profile of the
securitisation notes at any point, the originator shall ensure that same is
adequately informed and disclosed to investors, credit rating agencies and
other service providers within a maximum time frame of 14 calendar days.
requirements.object: in material alteration of the risk profile of the securitisation notes at any point, the originator shall ensure that same i

requirements.full_sentence:
The total exposure of an originator to the securitisation exposures belonging to
a particular securitisation structure or scheme should not exceed 20 per cent of
the total securitisation exposures created by such structure or scheme.
requirements.object: of the total securitisation exposures created by such structure or scheme

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the exposure of originators to credit enhancing interest only strip shall
be excluded from this limit.
requirements.object: limit

requirements.full_sentence: The minimum ticket size for issuance of securitisation notes shall be ₹ 1 crore.

The SPE should meet the following criteria to enable the originator to apply the
guidelines on capital adequacy and other aspects as prescribed in these
directions with regard to the securitisation exposures assumed by it:
(1) Any transaction between the originator and the SPE should be strictly on
arm's length basis.
requirements.object: to enable the originator to apply the guidelines on capital adequacy and other aspects as prescribed in these directions w

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The SPE and the trustee should not resemble in name or imply any
connection or relationship with the originator of the assets in its title or name.
requirements.object: imply any connection or relationship with the originator of the assets in its title or name

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The originator should not have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial
interest in the SPE except those specifically permitted under these directions.
requirements.object: or beneficial interest in the SPE except those specifically permitted under these directions

requirements.full_sentence: The originator shall not hold any share capital in the SPE.
requirements.object: in the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The originator should not have more than one representative, without veto
power, on the board of the SPE provided the board has at least four members
and independent directors are in majority.
requirements.object: representative, without veto power, on the board of the SPE provided the board has at least four members and independent directors

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The originator should not exercise control, directly or indirectly, over the
SPE and the trustees, and shall not settle the trust deed, if any.

(ii) The originator shall not have any ownership, proprietary or beneficial
interest in the trustees.
requirements.object: or beneficial interest in the trustees

requirements.full_sentence: (iii) The SPE should be bankruptcy remote and non-discretionary.
requirements.object: non-discretionary

conditions: if any, should lay down
requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The trust deed, if any, should lay down, in detail, the functions to be
performed by the trustee, their rights and obligations as well as the rights
and obligations of the investors in relation to the securitised assets.
requirements.object: the functions to be performed by the trustee, their rights and obligations as well as the rights and obligations of the investors

requirements.full_sentence:
The
trust deed should not provide for any discretion to the trustee as to the
manner of disposal and management or application of the trust property.
requirements.object: to the trustee as to the manner of disposal and management or application of the trust property

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to protect their interests, investors should be empowered in the
trust deed to change the trustee at any point of time.
requirements.object: trust deed to change the trustee at any point of time

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The trustee should only perform trusteeship functions in relation to the
SPE and should not undertake any other business with the SPE.
requirements.object: in relation to the SPE and should not undertake any other business with the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) A copy of the trust deed, if any, and the accounts and statement of affairs
of the SPE should be made available by the originator and/or other
lenders, to the RBI, if required to do so.
requirements.object: the originator and/or other lenders, to the RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The originator shall not support the losses of the SPE except under the
facilities explicitly permitted under these directions and shall also not be liable
to meet the recurring expenses of the SPE.
requirements.object: the SPE except under the facilities explicitly permitted under these directions and shall also not be liable to meet the recurri

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The SPE should make it clear to the investors in the securitization notes
issued by it that these securitisation notes are not insured and do not
represent deposit liabilities of the originator, servicer or trustees.
requirements.object: the investors in the securitization notes issued by it that these securitisation notes are not insured and do not represent deposit l

conditions: where the originator has purchased loans from another lender
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where the originator has purchased loans from another lender, the
provisions of Paragraph 28 shall apply to the lender from whom the originator
has purchased the exposures, as well.
requirements.object: from whom the originator has purchased the exposures, as well

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of sub-paragraph (4) of Paragraph 28
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for the purpose of sub-paragraph (4) of Paragraph 28, only one of
either the originator or the lender from whom loans were purchased by the
originator, may have the representative on the board of the SPE.
requirements.object: sub-paragraph (4) of Paragraph 28, only one of either the originator or the lender from whom loans were purchased by the originator

requirements.full_sentence:
An originator that sells assets to SPE may make representations and
warranties concerning those assets.
requirements.object: concerning those assets

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The exercise of a representation or warranty, requiring an originator to replace
assets (or any parts of them) sold to a SPE, must be:

(6) An originator that is required to pay damages for breach of representation or
warranty can do so provided the agreement to pay damages meets the
following conditions:
requirements.object: breach of representation or warranty can do so provided the agreement to pay damages meets the following conditions:

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) An originator should notify RBI (Department of Supervision) of all instances
where it has agreed to replace assets sold to SPE or pay damages arising out
of any representation or warranty.
requirements.object: Supervision) of all instances where it has agreed to replace assets sold to SPE or pay damages arising out of any representa

requirements.full_sentence:
Originators shall sell assets to SPE only on cash basis and the sale
consideration should be received not later than the transfer of the asset to the
SPE.
requirements.object: only on cash basis and the sale consideration should be received not later than the transfer of the asset to the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, there should not be gap of more than 30 days between transfer
of the assets and the issuance of securitisation notes.
requirements.object: than 30 days between transfer of the assets and the issuance of securitisation notes

requirements.full_sentence:
Any loss, profit or premium realised at the time of the sale should be accounted
accordingly and reflected in the Profit & Loss account for the accounting period
during which the sale is completed.
requirements.object: reflected in the Profit & Loss account for the accounting period during which the sale is completed

requirements.full_sentence:
The following treatment shall be applicable in the case of unrealised gains
arising out of sale of underlying assets to the SPE such as that associated with
expected future margin income (represented by interest-only strips or
otherwise):
(1) The unrealised gains should not be recognised in Profit and Loss account;
requirements.object: case of unrealised gains arising out of sale of underlying assets to the SPE such as that associated with expected future margin

requirements.full_sentence:
instead the AIFI shall hold the unrealised profit under an accounting head
styled as "Unrealised Gain on Loan Transfer Transactions".
requirements.object: under an accounting head styled as "Unrealised Gain on Loan Transfer Transactions"

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The profit may be recognised in Profit and Loss Account only when such
unrealised gains associated with expected future margin income is redeemed
in cash.
requirements.object: and Loss Account only when such unrealised gains associated with expected future margin income is redeemed in cash

conditions:
if the unrealised gains associated with expected future
margin income is credit enhancing (for example
requirements.full_sentence:
However, if the unrealised gains associated with expected future
margin income is credit enhancing (for example, in the form of credit
enhancing interest-only strip), the balance in this account may be treated as a
provision against potential losses incurred.
requirements.object: provision against potential losses incurred

requirements.full_sentence:
On
receipt, this amount may be credited to Profit and Loss account and the
amount equivalent to the amortisation due may be written-off against the
"Unrealised Gain on Loan Transfer Transactions" account bringing down the
book value of the credit-enhancing interest-only strip in the AIFI 's books.
requirements.object: and Loss account and the amount equivalent to the amortisation due may be written-off against the "Unrealised Gain on Loan Trans

conditions:
when the AIFI receives intimation of charging-off of losses by the SPE against
the credit-enhancing interest-only strip
requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In the case of a non-amortising credit-enhancing interest-only strip, as and
when the AIFI receives intimation of charging-off of losses by the SPE against
the credit-enhancing interest-only strip, it may write-off equivalent amount
against "Unrealised Gain on Loan Transfer Transactions" account and bring
down the book value of the credit-enhancing interest-only strip in the AIFI's
books.
requirements.object: "Unrealised Gain on Loan Transfer Transactions" account and bring down the book value of the credit-enhancing inte

requirements.full_sentence:
The amount received in final redemption value of the credit-enhancing
interest-only strip received in cash may be taken to Profit and Loss account.
requirements.object: and Loss account

requirements.full_sentence:
The assets underlying the securitisation should be homogeneous credit claims
or receivables eligible under Paragraph 5 to 9.
requirements.object: or receivables eligible under Paragraph 5 to 9

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit claims or receivables
should have contractually identified periodic payment streams relating to
principal, interest, or principal and interest payments.
requirements.object: payment streams relating to principal, interest, or principal and interest payments

requirements.full_sentence:
Any referenced interest
payments or discount rates should be based on an external benchmark.
requirements.object: external benchmark

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the "homogeneity" criterion should be assessed taking into
account the following principles:
(1) The nature of assets should be such that investors would not need to
analyse and assess materially different legal and/or credit risk factors and risk
profiles when carrying out risk analysis and due diligence checks of each
asset.
requirements.object: account the following principles: (1) The nature of assets should be such that investors would not need to analyse and assess

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Homogeneity should be assessed on the basis of common risk drivers,
including similar risk factors and risk profiles.
requirements.object: basis of common risk drivers, including similar risk factors and risk profiles

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Credit claims or receivables included in the securitisation should have
standard obligations, in terms of rights to payments and/or income from
assets and that result in a periodic and well-defined stream of payments to
investors.
requirements.object: terms of rights to payments and/or income from assets and that result in a periodic and well-defined stream of payments

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Repayment of noteholders should mainly rely on the principal and interest
proceeds from the securitised assets.
requirements.object: principal and interest proceeds from the securitised assets

requirements.full_sentence:
Partial reliance on refinancing or resale
of the asset securing the exposure may occur provided that refinancing is
sufficiently distributed within the pool and the residual values on which the
<image>
transaction relies are sufficiently low and that the reliance on refinancing is
thus not substantial.
requirements.object: within the pool and the residual values on which the <image> transaction relies are sufficiently low and that

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to provide investors with sufficient information on an asset class to
conduct appropriate due diligence and access to a sufficiently rich data set to
enable a more accurate calculation of expected loss in different stress
scenarios, verifiable loss performance data, such as delinquency and default
data, should be available for credit claims and receivables with substantially
similar risk characteristics to those being securitised, for a time period long
enough to permit meaningful evaluation by investors.
requirements.object: claims and receivables with substantially similar risk characteristics to those being securitised, for a time period long enou

requirements.full_sentence:
Sources of and access to data and the basis for claiming similarity to credit
claims or receivables being securitised should be clearly disclosed to all market
participants.
requirements.object: all market participants

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator of the securitisation or the original lending AIFI of the exposures
that are securitised, as the case may be, must have sufficient experience in
originating exposures similar to those securitised.
requirements.object: experience in originating exposures similar to those securitised

requirements.full_sentence:
For capital purposes,
investors must determine whether the performance history of the originator for
substantially similar claims or receivables to those being securitised has been
established for an "appropriately long period of time".
requirements.object: history of the originator for substantially similar claims or receivables to those being securitised has been establ

requirements.full_sentence:
This performance history
must be no shorter than a period of seven years for non-retail exposures.
requirements.object: a period of seven years for non-retail exposures

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit claims or receivables being transferred to the SPE may not, at the time
of inclusion in the pool, include obligations that are in default or delinquent or
obligations for which the originator, servicer and other parties with a fiduciary
responsibility to the securitisation note holders are aware of evidence indicating
a material increase in expected losses or of enforcement actions.
requirements.object: of inclusion in the pool, include obligations that are in default or delinquent or obligations for which the originator, servicer and

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure that the quality of the securitised credit claims and receivables are
not affected by changes in underwriting standards, the originator should
demonstrate to investors that any credit claims or receivables being transferred
<image>
to the SPE have been originated in the ordinary course of the originator's
business to materially non-deteriorating underwriting standards.
requirements.object: any credit claims or receivables being transferred <image> to the SPE have been originated in the ordinary course of the

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator should verify that the underlying credit claims or receivables
meet the following conditions:
(1) the credit claims or receivables is not under the monitoring period as defined
in defined in the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025;
requirements.object: credit claims or receivables meet the following conditions: (1) the credit claims or receivables is not under the monitorin

requirements.full_sentence:
The assessment of these conditions should be carried out by the originator no
earlier than 45 days prior to the date on which the securitisation comes into
effect.
requirements.object: the originator no earlier than 45 days prior to the date on which the securitisation comes into effect

requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, at the time of this assessment, there should, to the best
knowledge of the originator, be no evidence indicating likely deterioration in the
performance status of the credit claim or receivable.
requirements.object: knowledge of the originator, be no evidence indicating likely deterioration in the performance status of the credit claim or receivable

requirements.full_sentence:
Underwriting standards should not be less stringent than those applied to credit
claims and receivables retained on the balance sheet.
requirements.object: those applied to credit claims and receivables retained on the balance sheet

requirements.full_sentence:
In all circumstances, all
credit claims or receivables must be originated in accordance with sound and
prudent underwriting criteria based on an assessment that the obligor has the
"ability and volition to make timely payments" on its obligations.
requirements.object: with sound and prudent underwriting criteria based on an assessment that the obligor has the "ability and volition to make

requirements.full_sentence:
While assets transferred to a securitisation will be subject to defined criteria as
approved by the Board of the originator, the performance of the securitisation
<image>
should not rely upon the ongoing selection of assets through active
management on a discretionary basis of the securitisation's underlying portfolio.
requirements.object: selection of assets through active management on a discretionary basis of the securitisation's underlying portfolio

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit claims or receivables transferred to a securitisation should satisfy clearly
defined eligibility criteria.
requirements.object: criteria

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit claims or receivables transferred to a
securitisation after the date on which securitisation becomes effective may not
be actively selected, actively managed or otherwise cherrypicked on a
discretionary basis.
requirements.object: managed or otherwise cherrypicked on a discretionary basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The securitisation should be such that the underlying credit claims or
receivables:
(1) are enforceable against the obligor and their enforceability is included in the
representations and warranties of the originator;
requirements.object: underlying credit claims or receivables: (1) are enforceable against the obligor and their enforceability is included in the represen

requirements.full_sentence:
and
(5) for regulatory capital purposes, an independent third-party legal opinion must
support the claim that the transfer of assets under the applicable laws comply
with the above sub-paragraphs.
requirements.object: the transfer of assets under the applicable laws comply with the above sub-paragraphs

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator should provide representations and warranties that the credit
claims or receivables being transferred to the SPE are not subject to any
condition or encumbrance that can be foreseen to adversely affect
enforceability in respect of collections due.
requirements.object: that the credit claims or receivables being transferred to the SPE are not subject to any condition or encumbra

requirements.full_sentence:
To assist investors in conducting appropriate due diligence prior to investing in
a new offering, sufficient loan-level data in accordance with applicable laws or,
in the case of granular pools, summary stratification data on the relevant risk
characteristics of the underlying pool should be available to potential investors
before pricing of a securitisation.
requirements.object: investors before pricing of a securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
To assist investors in conducting appropriate and ongoing monitoring of their
investments' performance and so that investors that wish to purchase a
securitisation in the secondary market have sufficient information to conduct
appropriate due diligence, timely loan-level data in accordance with applicable
laws or granular pool stratification data on the risk characteristics of the
underlying pool and standardised investor reports should be readily available to
current and potential investors at least quarterly throughout the life of the
securitisation.
requirements.object: current and potential investors at least quarterly throughout the life of the securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
Cut-off dates of the loan-level or granular pool stratification data
should be aligned with those used for investor reporting.
requirements.object: used for investor reporting

requirements.full_sentence:
To provide a level of assurance that the reporting of the underlying credit claims
or receivables is accurate and that the underlying credit claims or receivables
meet the eligibility requirements, the initial portfolio should be reviewed for
conformity with the eligibility requirements by an appropriate legally
accountable and independent third party.
requirements.object: with the eligibility requirements by an appropriate legally accountable and independent third party

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The review should confirm that the credit claims or receivables
transferred to the SPE meet the portfolio eligibility requirements.
requirements.object: claims or receivables transferred to the SPE meet the portfolio eligibility requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
The verification
report need not be provided but its results, including any material exceptions,
should be disclosed in the initial offering documentation.
requirements.object: initial offering documentation

requirements.full_sentence:
To help ensure that the underlying credit claims or receivables do not need to
be refinanced over a short period of time, there should not be a reliance on the
sale or refinancing of the underlying credit claims or receivables in order to
repay the liabilities of the SPE, unless the underlying pool of credit claims or
receivables is sufficiently granular and has sufficiently distributed repayment
<image>
profiles.
requirements.object: the sale or refinancing of the underlying credit claims or receivables in order to repay the liabilities of the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
Rights to receive income from the assets specified to support
redemption payments should be considered as eligible credit claims or
receivables in this regard.
requirements.object: credit claims or receivables in this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
To reduce the payment risk arising from the different interest rate and currency
profiles of assets and liabilities and to improve investors' ability to model cash
flows, interest rate and foreign currency risks should be appropriately mitigated
at all times, and if any hedging transaction is executed the transaction should
be documented according to industry-standard master agreements.
requirements.object: all times, and if any hedging transaction is executed the transaction should be documented according to industry-standar

requirements.full_sentence:
Only
derivatives used for genuine hedging of asset and liability mismatches of
interest rate and / or currency should be allowed.

(1) For capital purposes, the term "appropriately mitigated" should be understood
as not necessarily requiring a completely perfect hedge.
requirements.object: necessarily requiring a completely perfect hedge

requirements.full_sentence:
The appropriateness
of the mitigation of interest rate and foreign currency through the life of the
transaction must be demonstrated by making available to potential investors,
in a timely and regular manner, quantitative information including the fraction
of notional amounts that are hedged, as well as sensitivity analysis that
illustrates the effectiveness of the hedge under extreme but plausible
scenarios.
requirements.object: available to potential investors, in a timely and regular manner, quantitative information including the fraction of notiona

requirements.full_sentence:
Non-derivative risk
mitigation measures must be fully funded and available at all times.
requirements.object: available at all times

requirements.full_sentence:
Investor reports should contain information that allows investors to monitor the
evolution over time of the indicators that are subject to triggers.
requirements.object: investors to monitor the evolution over time of the indicators that are subject to triggers

requirements.full_sentence:
Any triggers
breached between payment dates should be disclosed to investors on a timely
basis in accordance with the terms and conditions of all underlying transaction
documents.
requirements.object: on a timely basis in accordance with the terms and conditions of all underlying transaction documents

requirements.full_sentence:
Following the occurrence of a performance-related trigger, an event of default
or an acceleration event, the securitisation positions should be repaid in
accordance with a sequential amortisation priority of payments, in order of
tranche seniority, and there should not be provisions requiring immediate
liquidation of the underlying assets at market value.
requirements.object: with a sequential amortisation priority of payments, in order of tranche seniority, and there should not be provisions requiri

requirements.full_sentence:
To assist investors in their ability to appropriately model the cash flow waterfall
of the securitisation, the originator should make available to investors, both
before pricing of the securitisation and on an ongoing basis, a liability cash flow
model or information on the cash flow provisions allowing appropriate modelling
of the securitisation cash flow waterfall.
requirements.object: both before pricing of the securitisation and on an ongoing basis, a liability cash flow model or information on the cash

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure that debt forgiveness, loan moratoriums, payment holidays,
restructurings and other asset performance remedies can be clearly identified,
policies and procedures, definitions, remedies and actions relating to
delinquency, default or restructuring of underlying debtors should be provided in
clear and consistent terms, such that investors can clearly identify debt
forgiveness, loan moratoriums, payment holidays, restructuring and other asset
performance remedies on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: and consistent terms, such that investors can clearly identify debt forgiveness, loan moratoriums, payment holidays, restructurin

requirements.full_sentence:
To help ensure clarity for note holders of their rights and ability to control and
enforce on the underlying credit claims or receivables, upon insolvency of the
originator, all voting and enforcement rights related to the credit claims or
receivables should be transferred to the SPE.
requirements.object: SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
Investors' rights in the
securitisation should be clearly defined in all circumstances, including the rights
of senior versus junior note holders.
requirements.object: all circumstances, including the rights of senior versus junior note holders

conditions: when legally permissible
requirements.full_sentence:
To help investors to fully understand the terms, conditions, legal and
commercial information prior to investing in a new offering and to ensure that
this information is set out in a clear and effective manner for all programmes
and offerings, sufficient initial offering and draft underlying documentation
should be made available to investors (and readily available to potential
investors on a continuous basis) within a reasonably sufficient period of time
prior to pricing, or when legally permissible, such that the investor is provided
<image>
with full disclosure of the legal and commercial information and comprehensive
risk factors needed to make informed investment decisions.
requirements.object: investors (and readily available to potential investors on a continuous basis) within a reasonably sufficient period of time prio

requirements.full_sentence:
Final offering documents should be available from the closing date and all final
underlying transaction documents shortly thereafter.
requirements.object: closing date and all final underlying transaction documents shortly thereafter

requirements.full_sentence:
These should be
composed such that readers can readily find, understand and use relevant
information.
requirements.object: readers can readily find, understand and use relevant information

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure that all the documentation of securitisation transactions has been
subject to appropriate review prior to publication, the terms and documentation
of the securitisation should be reviewed by an appropriately experienced third
party legal practice, such as a legal counsel already instructed by one of the
transaction parties.
requirements.object: appropriately experienced third party legal practice, such as a legal counsel already instructed by one of the transaction parties

requirements.full_sentence:
Investors should be notified in a timely fashion of any
changes in such documents that have an impact on the structural risks in the
securitisation.
requirements.object: timely fashion of any changes in such documents that have an impact on the structural risks in the securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
To help ensure servicers have extensive workout expertise, thorough legal and
collateral knowledge and a proven track record in loss mitigation, such parties
should be able to demonstrate expertise in the servicing of the underlying credit
claims or receivables, supported by a management team with extensive
industry experience.
requirements.object: expertise in the servicing of the underlying credit claims or receivables, supported by a management team with extensive indust

requirements.full_sentence:
The servicer should at all times act in accordance with
reasonable and prudent standards.
requirements.object: in accordance with reasonable and prudent standards

requirements.full_sentence:
Policies, procedures and risk management controls should be well documented
and adhere to good market practices and relevant regulatory regimes.
requirements.object: adhere to good market practices and relevant regulatory regimes

requirements.full_sentence:
There
should be strong systems and reporting capabilities in place.
requirements.object: reporting capabilities in place

requirements.full_sentence:
In assessing
whether "strong systems and reporting capabilities are in place" for capital
purposes, well documented policies, procedures and risk management controls,
as well as strong systems and reporting capabilities, may be substantiated by a
third-party review.
requirements.object: third-party review

requirements.full_sentence:
The party or parties with fiduciary responsibility should act on a timely basis in
the best interests of the securitisation note holders, and both the initial offering
and all underlying documentation should contain provisions facilitating the
timely resolution of conflicts between different classes of note holders by the
trustees, to the extent permitted by applicable law.
requirements.object: basis in the best interests of the securitisation note holders, and both the initial offering and all underlying documentation should

requirements.full_sentence:
The party or parties with fiduciary responsibility to the securitisation and to
investors should be able to demonstrate sufficient skills and resources to
comply with their duties of care in the administration of the SPE.
requirements.object: sufficient skills and resources to comply with their duties of care in the administration of the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
To increase the likelihood that those identified as having a fiduciary
responsibility towards investors as well as the servicer execute their duties in
full on a timely basis, remuneration should be such that these parties are
incentivised and able to meet their responsibilities in full and on a timely basis.
requirements.object: parties are incentivised and able to meet their responsibilities in full and on a timely basis

requirements.full_sentence:
To help provide full transparency to investors, assist investors in the conduct of
their due diligence and to prevent investors being subject to unexpected
disruptions in cash flow collections and servicing, the contractual obligations,
duties and responsibilities of all key parties to the securitisation, both those with
a fiduciary responsibility and of the ancillary service providers, should be
defined clearly both in the initial offering and all underlying documentation.
requirements.object: in the initial offering and all underlying documentation

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of this paragraph, "initial offering" and "underlying
transaction documentation" shall have the same meaning as in the explanation
to the Paragraph 60 above.
requirements.object: as in the explanation to the Paragraph 60 above

requirements.full_sentence:
Provisions should be documented for the replacement of servicers, bank
account providers, derivatives counterparties and liquidity providers in the event
<image>
of failure or non-performance or insolvency or other deterioration of
creditworthiness of any such counterparty to the securitisation.
requirements.object: replacement of servicers, bank account providers, derivatives counterparties and liquidity providers in the event <image> of fai

requirements.full_sentence:
To enhance transparency and visibility over all receipts, payments and ledger
entries at all times, the performance reports to investors should distinguish and
report the securitisation's income and disbursements, such as scheduled
principal, redemption principal, scheduled interest, prepaid principal, past due
interest and fees and charges, delinquent, defaulted and restructured amounts
under debt forgiveness and payment holidays, including accurate accounting
for amounts attributable to principal and interest deficiency ledgers.
requirements.object: securitisation's income and disbursements, such as scheduled principal, redemption principal, scheduled interest, prepaid p

conditions:
where the exposures are loans secured by residential mortgages or fully
guaranteed residential loans
requirements.full_sentence:
At the portfolio cut-off date (Date post which no credit claim or receivable
transfer shall happen to SPE except against breach of representation and
warranties as permitted under these directions) the underlying exposures have
to meet the conditions under the Standardised Approach for credit risk, and
after taking into account any eligible credit risk mitigation, for being assigned a
risk weight equal to or smaller than:
(1) 40 per cent on a value-weighted average exposure basis for the portfolio
where the exposures are loans secured by residential mortgages or fully
guaranteed residential loans;
requirements.object: against breach of representation and warranties as permitted under these directions) the underlying exposures have to meet the co

requirements.full_sentence:
At the portfolio cut-off date, the aggregated value of all exposures to a single
obligor shall not exceed one per cent of the aggregated outstanding exposure
value of all exposures in the portfolio.
requirements.object: of the aggregated outstanding exposure value of all exposures in the portfolio

conditions:
if the originator retains subordinated tranche(s) that
form credit enhancements that are loss absorbing
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the applicable maximum concentration threshold could be
increased to two per cent if the originator retains subordinated tranche(s) that
form credit enhancements that are loss absorbing, and which cover at least the
<image>
first 10 per cent of losses.
requirements.object: threshold could be increased to two per cent if the originator retains subordinated tranche(s) that form credit e

requirements.full_sentence:
These tranche(s) retained by the originator shall not
be eligible for the STC capital treatment.
requirements.object: STC capital treatment

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator shall disclose to investors all necessary information at the
transaction level to allow investors to determine whether the securitisation is
STC compliant.
requirements.object: necessary information at the transaction level to allow investors to determine whether the securitisation is STC compliant

requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the information provided by the originator, the
investor must make its own assessment of the securitisation's STC compliance
status before applying the alternative capital treatment.
requirements.object: of the securitisation's STC compliance status before applying the alternative capital treatment

requirements.full_sentence:
For securitisation exposures retained by the originator, where significant credit
risk transfer in terms of the requirements of the Reserve Bank of India (All India
Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025
have been achieved by the originator, the determination of compliance with
STC requirements shall be made by the originator.
requirements.object: originator

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Notwithstanding, investors and holders of the securitisation positions are
expected to take into account developments that may invalidate the previous
compliance assessment, for example deficiencies in the frequency and
content of the investor reports, in the alignment of interest, or changes in the
transaction documentation at variance with relevant STC criteria.
requirements.object: assessment, for example deficiencies in the frequency and content of the investor reports, in the alignment of inte

requirements.full_sentence:
The criteria for the addition of assets shall be
clearly described in relevant transaction documents.
requirements.object: relevant transaction documents

requirements.full_sentence:
Investors should consider whether the originator, servicer, and other parties
with a fiduciary responsibility to the securitisation note holders have an
established performance history for substantially similar credit claims or
receivables to those being securitised and for an appropriately long period of
time.
requirements.object: servicer, and other parties with a fiduciary responsibility to the securitisation note holders have an established pe

requirements.full_sentence:
Lenders may provide supporting facilities such as credit enhancement facilities,
liquidity facilities, underwriting facilities and servicing facilities.
requirements.object: as credit enhancement facilities, liquidity facilities, underwriting facilities and servicing facilities

requirements.full_sentence:
Apart from
lenders, since such facilities may also be provided by entities that are not
lenders, entities providing such facilities are referred to in this chapter as
"facility providers".
requirements.object: entities that are not lenders, entities providing such facilities are referred to in this chapter as "facility providers"

requirements.full_sentence:
Such facility provider(s) must be regulated by at least one
financial sector regulator.
requirements.object: least one financial sector regulator

requirements.full_sentence:
The facilities, as above, provided by facility providers should satisfy the
following conditions, in addition to the specific conditions applicable to each
facility as prescribed in the remaining paragraphs of this Chapter:
(1) Provision of the facility should be structured in a manner to keep it distinct
from other facilities and documented separately from any other facility
provided by the facility provider.
requirements.object: in addition to the specific conditions applicable to each facility as prescribed in the remaining paragraphs of this

requirements.full_sentence:
The nature, purpose, extent of the facility
and all required standards of performance should be clearly specified in a
written agreement to be executed at the time of originating the transaction
and disclosed in the offer document.
requirements.object: a written agreement to be executed at the time of originating the transaction and disclosed in the offer document

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) There should not be any recourse to the facility provider beyond the fixed
contractual obligations.
requirements.object: the facility provider beyond the fixed contractual obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
In particular, the facility provider should not bear any
recurring expenses of the securitisation.
requirements.object: of the securitisation

requirements.full_sentence: Such facilities may be provided by both originators and third parties.
requirements.object: originators and third parties

requirements.full_sentence:
The facility
provider providing credit enhancement facilities should ensure that the following
<image>
conditions are fulfilled failing which credit enhancement provider will be required
to hold capital equal to the full value of the securitised assets:
(1) All conditions specified in Paragraphs 79 and 80.
requirements.object: <image> conditions are fulfilled failing which credit enhancement provider will be required to hold capital equal to the ful

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Credit enhancement facility should be provided only at the initiation of the
securitisation transaction.
requirements.object: the initiation of the securitisation transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The amount of credit enhancement extended at the initiation of the
securitisation transaction should be available to the SPE during the entire life
of the securitisation notes in respect of which such credit enhancement is
provided, subject to any resets of such credit enhancement specifically
permitted under these directions.
requirements.object: SPE during the entire life of the securitisation notes in respect of which such credit enhancement is provided

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Any utilization / draw down of the credit enhancement should be immediately
written-off by debit to the profit and loss account by facility provider.
requirements.object: debit to the profit and loss account by facility provider

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) At the time of reset, all the outstanding tranches of securitisation notes should
be re-rated (other than equity tranches).
requirements.object: equity tranches)

conditions: If reset is permissible in terms of (1) above
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If reset is permissible in terms of (1) above, the amount of credit enhancement
required for retaining the original or current outstanding rating, whichever is
higher should be determined by the concerned rating agency for the first
reset.
requirements.object: concerned rating agency for the first reset

requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, for subsequent resets, the amount of credit enhancement
required for retaining the higher of the rating at the time of previous reset and
current outstanding rating should be determined by the concerned rating
agency.
requirements.object: concerned rating agency

conditions: Provided that only the rating agency
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided that only the rating agency, subject to its continued rating
operations, which had rated the securitisation transaction initially shall re-rate
it for the purpose of reset of credit enhancement.
requirements.object: purpose of reset of credit enhancement

requirements.full_sentence:
Enabling clauses and
commercial terms must be made part of the initial contract to ensure the
implementation of this regulatory advisory failing which credit enhancement
reset cannot be executed.
requirements.object: the initial contract to ensure the implementation of this regulatory advisory failing which credit enhancement reset cannot be execute

requirements.full_sentence:
The consent may either be explicitly
obtained during every reset or the transactions documents may contain
general clauses providing implicit consent of the investors for rest of credit
enhancement.
requirements.object: during every reset or the transactions documents may contain general clauses providing implicit consent of the investors

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The reset of credit enhancement should be provided for in the contractual
terms of the transaction and the initial rating of the transaction should take into
account the likelihood of resets.
requirements.object: the contractual terms of the transaction and the initial rating of the transaction should take into account the likelihood of reset

requirements.full_sentence:
Such contractual clause should include
clearly defined portfolio-level delinquency triggers, which, if met, should result
in the credit enhancement resets not available or possible.
requirements.object: delinquency triggers, which

conditions: In case such a contractual clause was not available originally
requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In case such a contractual clause was not available originally, reset of credit
enhancement may be carried out subject to the consent of all investors of
outstanding securitisation notes.
requirements.object: to the consent of all investors of outstanding securitisation notes

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) In structures where external credit enhancements exist providing first loss
credit enhancement (FLCE) and second loss credit enhancement (SLCE), the
reset may be carried out simultaneously between FLCE and SLCE in a
proportion such that the reset maintains at least the outstanding rating [as
envisaged in sub-paragraph (2) above] of SLCE.
requirements.object: between FLCE and SLCE in a proportion such that the reset maintains at least the outstanding rating [as envisaged in sub

requirements.full_sentence:
For all securitisations other than residential mortgage backed-securitisations, at
the time of first reset, at least 50 per cent of the total principal amount assigned
at the time of initiation of the securitisation transaction must have been
amortised.

The subsequent resets may be carried out after the pool principal
has amortised in steps of 10 per cent, i.e., up to at least 60 per cent, 70 per
<image>
cent and 80 per cent of the original level.
requirements.object: the pool principal has amortised in steps of 10 per cent, i

requirements.full_sentence:
However, a minimum gap of six
months should be maintained between successive resets.
requirements.object: resets

requirements.full_sentence:
For residential mortgage-backed securitisations, at the time of first reset, at
least 25 per cent of the total principal amount assigned at the time of initiation
of the securitisation transaction must have been amortised.

The subsequent
resets may be carried out at every 10 per cent (of the original level) further
amortisation of the pool principal.
requirements.object: every 10 per cent (of the original level) further amortisation of the pool principal

requirements.full_sentence:
A minimum gap of six months should be
maintained between successive resets.
requirements.object: resets

requirements.full_sentence:
The excess credit enhancement can be released subject to the following
conditions:
(1) The release of credit enhancement would be subject to a reserve floor as a
percentage of the initial credit enhancement provided at the time of
transaction, i.e., at any time, the level of credit enhancement available,
following any reset shall not drop below the prescribed reserve floor.
requirements.object: reserve floor

conditions: if the required level of credit enhancement to maintain the ratings
requirements.full_sentence:
Thus,
even if the required level of credit enhancement to maintain the ratings, as
assessed by the credit rating agency during a reset, is lower than the reserve
floor, the excess amount available for reset shall be computed as the
difference between the available credit enhancement and the reserve floor.
requirements.object: difference between the available credit enhancement and the reserve floor

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The stipulation of the floor may be based on the transaction structure,
depending on asset class, the track record of the originator and other pool
specific factors such as concentration of long-term contracts in a pool, and in
no case should be less than:
requirements.object: transaction structure, depending on asset class, the track record of the originator and other pool specific factors such as concentrat

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) A maximum of 60 per cent of the credit enhancement in excess of that
required to retain the credit rating of all the tranches as referred to in sub-
paragraph (2) of Paragraph 83 assigned to them can be considered for
release, at any point of time subject to fulfilling the reserve floor indicated at
sub-paragraph (1) above.
requirements.object: rating of all the tranches as referred to in sub- paragraph (2) of Paragraph 83 assigned to them can be considered for release, a

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(4) The reset should not lead to exposures retained by originators along with
credit enhancements offered by them falling below the level of MRR
prescribed in Paragraphs 10 to 15.
requirements.object: by originators along with credit enhancements offered by them falling below the level of MRR prescribed in Paragraphs 10 to

requirements.full_sentence:
A liquidity facility should meet all of the
following conditions to guard against the possibility of the facility functioning as
a form of credit enhancement and/ or credit support:
(1) All conditions specified in Paragraphs 79 and 80.
requirements.object: following conditions to guard against the possibility of the facility functioning as a form of credit enhancement and/ or credit suppo

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The documentation for the facility must clearly define the circumstances
under which the facility may or may not be drawn on.
requirements.object: under which the facility may or may not be drawn on

conditions:
where there is a sufficient
level of non-defaulted assets to cover drawings
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The facility should be capable of being drawn only where there is a sufficient
level of non-defaulted assets to cover drawings, or the full amount of assets
that may turn non-performing are covered by a substantial credit
enhancement.
requirements.object: by a substantial credit enhancement

requirements.full_sentence: (4) The facility shall not be drawn for the purpose of:
requirements.object: purpose of:

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) serving as a permanent revolving funding, i.e., liquidity support should
be an exception rather than the norm;
requirements.object: than the norm

requirements.full_sentence: (5) The liquidity facility should not be available for the following purposes:
requirements.object: following purposes:

requirements.full_sentence: (6) Facility should be provided to SPE and not directly to the investors.
requirements.object: and not directly to the investors

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) When the liquidity facility has been drawn the facility provider shall have a
priority of claim over the future cash flows from the underlying assets, and
thus shall be senior to the senior tranche.
requirements.object: claim over the future cash flows from the underlying assets, and thus shall be senior to the senior tranche

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The originator must not be liable to meet any shortfall in liquidity support
provided by any independent third party.
requirements.object: any shortfall in liquidity support provided by any independent third party

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the
liquidity facility provided by a third party shall be treated as a credit
enhancement.
requirements.object: credit enhancement

requirements.full_sentence:
Since the liquidity facility is meant to smoothen temporary cash flow
mismatches, the facility shall remain drawn only for short periods, preferably not
used for two consecutive repayments to investors.
requirements.object: short periods, preferably not used for two consecutive repayments to investors

conditions:
If the drawings under the
facility are outstanding for more than 90 days
requirements.full_sentence:
If the drawings under the
facility are outstanding for more than 90 days, it should be classified as NPA
and fully provided for.
requirements.object: and fully provided for

requirements.full_sentence:
An originator or a third-party service provider may act as an underwriter for the
issue of securitisation notes by SPE and treat the facility as an underwriting
facility for capital adequacy purposes subject to the following conditions:
(1) All conditions specified in Paragraphs 79 and 80 are satisfied.
requirements.object: for the issue of securitisation notes by SPE and treat the facility as an underwriting facility for capital adequacy purposes su

requirements.full_sentence:
An originator may underwrite only investment grade senior notes issued by the
SPE.
requirements.object: senior notes issued by the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
Hence, it should not have any obligation to support any losses incurred by the
SPE, except to the extent contractually provided in the servicing facility
agreement indemnifying the SPE from defaults, breaches, negligence or fraud
by the servicing facility provider, and should be able to demonstrate this to the
investors in the securitisation exposures.
requirements.object: support any losses incurred by the SPE

requirements.full_sentence:
A facility provider performing the role
of a service provider for a proprietary or a third-party securitisation transaction
should ensure that the following conditions are fulfilled:
(1) All conditions specified in Paragraphs 79 and 80.
requirements.object: conditions are fulfilled: (1) All conditions specified in Paragraphs 79 and 80

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The service provider should be under no obligation to remit funds to the SPE
or investors until it has received funds generated from the underlying assets
except where it is also the provider of an eligible liquidity facility.
requirements.object: to remit funds to the SPE or investors until it has received funds generated from the underlying assets except where it is also

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The service provider shall hold in trust, on behalf of the investors, the cash
flows arising from the underlying and should avoid co-mingling of these cash
flows with their own cash flows.
requirements.object: behalf of the investors, the cash flows arising from the underlying and should avoid co-mingling of these cash flows with their own

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The service provider should remit all the cashflows arising from the underlying
loans forming part of the securitised pools to the SPE as per the agreed
mechanism, irrespective of any retained interest in the securitisation
transaction in other capacities.
requirements.object: arising from the underlying loans forming part of the securitised pools to the SPE as per the agreed mechanism, irrespective o

conditions: Where any of the above conditions are not met
requirements.full_sentence:
Where any of the above conditions are not met, the service provider may be
deemed as providing liquidity facility to the SPE or investors and treated
accordingly for capital adequacy purpose.
requirements.object: liquidity facility to the SPE or investors and treated accordingly for capital adequacy purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, only if the originator has explicitly disclosed that it has complied with
the applicable provisions of the Know Your Customer (KYC) Directions, AIFI
may invest in such securitised notes.
requirements.object: notes

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall have a comprehensive understanding of the risk characteristics of its
individual securitisation exposures as well as the risk characteristics of the
pools underlying its securitisation exposures, at all times.
requirements.object: of the risk characteristics of its individual securitisation exposures as well as the risk characteristics of the p

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI should be able to access performance information on the underlying pools
on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: performance information on the underlying pools on an ongoing basis

requirements.full_sentence:
Such information may include, as appropriate, but not
limited to the following: the average credit quality through average credit scores
or similar aggregates of creditworthiness, extent of diversification of the pool of
loans, volatility of the market values of the collaterals supporting the loans,
cyclicality of the economic activities in which the underlying borrowers are
engaged, exposure type, prepayment rates, property types, occupancy, etc.
requirements.object: not limited to the following: the average credit quality through average credit scores or similar aggregates of creditwor

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI should have a thorough understanding of all structural features of a
securitisation transaction that would materially impact the performance of their
exposures to the transaction.
requirements.object: of all structural features of a securitisation transaction that would materially impact the performance of their exposur

requirements.full_sentence:
Such information may include, as appropriate, but
not limited to the following: seniority of the tranche, thickness of the subordinate
tranches, its sensitivity to prepayment risk and credit enhancement resets,
structure of repayment waterfalls, waterfall related triggers, the position of the
tranche in sequential repayment of tranches, liquidity enhancements,
availability of credit enhancements in the case of liquidity facilities, deal-specific
definition of default, etc.
requirements.object: not limited to the following: seniority of the tranche, thickness of the subordinate tranches, its sensitivity to prepaym

conditions:
in case the securitised
assets had been purchased
requirements.full_sentence:
Apart from the above, AIFI should take note of, analyse and record the
following while taking the decision regarding a securitisation exposure:
(1) the reputation of the originators in terms of observance of credit appraisal and
credit monitoring standards, due diligence standards in case the securitised
assets had been purchased, adherence to minimum retention and minimum
holding standards in earlier securitisations, and fairness in selecting
exposures for securitisation;
requirements.object: and record the following while taking the decision regarding a securitisation exposure: (1) the reputation of the originators in

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI should regularly perform its own stress tests appropriate to its
securitisation positions.
requirements.object: stress tests appropriate to its securitisation positions

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, various factors which may be
considered include, but are not limited to, rise in default rates in the underlying
portfolios in a situation of economic downturn, rise in pre-payment rates due to
fall in rate of interest or rise in income levels of the borrowers leading to early
redemption of exposures, fall in rating of the credit enhancers resulting in fall in
market value of securitisation notes and drying of liquidity of the securitisation
notes resulting in higher prudent valuation adjustments.
requirements.object: are not limited to, rise in default rates in the underlying portfolios in a situation of economic downturn, rise in pre-pay

requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the results of
stress tests, additional capital shall be held to support any higher risk, if
required.
requirements.object: any higher risk

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall have Board approved policies detailing valuation of the securitisation
notes in which they have invested.
requirements.object: detailing valuation of the securitisation notes in which they have invested

requirements.full_sentence:
The policies should inter alia describe the
models used for valuation, the assumptions underpinning the models, the policy
regarding back-testing and stress testing the valuation model and its
parameters etc.
requirements.object: models used for valuation, the assumptions underpinning the models, the policy regarding back-testing and stress testing the v

requirements.full_sentence:
Action may include
modification to exposure ceilings to certain type of asset class underlying
securitisation, modification to ceilings applicable to originators etc.
requirements.object: ceilings to certain type of asset class underlying securitisation, modification to ceilings applicable to originators

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, AIFI should establish formal procedures appropriate to their
banking book and trading book and commensurate with the risk profile of their
exposures in securitised positions as stipulated in Paragraphs 99 to 101.
