requirements.object: to their banking book and trading book and commensurate with the risk profile of their exposures in securitise

requirements.full_sentence:
Where
relevant, this shall include the exposure type, the percentage of loans more
than 30, 60 and 90 days past due, default rates, prepayment rates, loans in
foreclosure, collateral type and occupancy and frequency distribution of credit
scores or other measures of credit worthiness across underlying exposures,
industry and geographical diversification, frequency distribution of loan to value
ratios with bandwidths that facilitate adequate sensitivity analysis.
requirements.object: the percentage of loans more than 30, 60 and 90 days past due, default rates, prepayment rates, loans in foreclosure, colla

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI may
inter alia make use of the disclosures made by the originators in the form given
in Annex I to monitor the securitisation exposures.
requirements.object: of the disclosures made by the originators in the form given in Annex I to monitor the securitisation exposures

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall maintain capital against all securitisation exposure amounts,
including those arising from the provision of credit risk mitigants to a
securitisation transaction, investments in asset-backed or mortgage-backed
securities, retention of a subordinated tranche, and extension of a liquidity
facility or credit enhancement.
requirements.object: securitisation exposure amounts, including those arising from the provision of credit risk mitigants to a securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
AIFI shall be guided by Reserve Bank of India
(All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025 on Capital requirements for securitisation exposures.
requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 on Capital requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever a third-party servicing agent service have been availed, the originator
shall ensure robust and legally binding information sharing mechanisms are in
place to comply with stipulated reporting requirements with requisite frequency
and rigor.
requirements.object: binding information sharing mechanisms are in place to comply with stipulated reporting requirements with requisite frequenc

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases of obtaining data from third-party entities, originator
must get information duly certified by the respective third-party auditors,
preferably at a frequency of no more than a year.
requirements.object: by the respective third-party auditors, preferably at a frequency of no more than a year

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator(s) should disclose to investors the weighted average holding
period of the assets securitised and the level of their MRR in the securitisation.
requirements.object: weighted average holding period of the assets securitised and the level of their MRR in the securitisation

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator(s) should ensure that prospective investors have readily
available access to all materially relevant data on the credit quality and
performance of the individual underlying exposures, cash flows and collateral
supporting a securitisation exposure as well as such information that is
necessary to conduct comprehensive and well-informed stress tests on the
cash flows and collateral values supporting the underlying exposures.
requirements.object: have readily available access to all materially relevant data on the credit quality and performance of the individua

requirements.full_sentence:
The disclosure by an originator of its fulfilment of the MHP and MRR should be
made available publicly and shall be appropriately documented;

<image>
(1) The disclosure should be made at origination of the transaction, and should
be confirmed thereafter at a minimum half yearly (September and March), and
at any point where the requirement is breached.
requirements.object: of the transaction, and should be confirmed thereafter at a minimum half yearly (September and March), and at any point where t

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The above periodical disclosures should be made separately for each
securitisation transaction, throughout its life, in the servicer report, investor
report, trustee report, or any similar document published.
requirements.object: each securitisation transaction, throughout its life, in the servicer report, investor report, trustee report, or any similar d

requirements.full_sentence: The aforesaid disclosures shall be made in the format given in Annex 1.
requirements.object: format given in Annex 1

requirements.full_sentence:
These
disclosures shall be made separately for each securitisation transaction
throughout the life of the transaction.
requirements.object: each securitisation transaction throughout the life of the transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall be guided by Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
2025 for all disclosure-related requirements.
requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 for all di

requirements.full_sentence:
The originator must also submit the details of the securitisation transactions
undertaken, including the details of the securitisation notes issued, to the
Reserve Bank on a quarterly basis.
requirements.object: of the securitisation transactions undertaken, including the details of the securitisation notes issued, to the Reserve Bank o

requirements.full_sentence:
The format for the same shall be
communicated separately and shall be effective from the date advised therein.
requirements.object: shall be effective from the date advised therein

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

(iv) Rating-wise distribution of underlying loans (if these loans are rated)
a) Internal grade of the AIFI/external grade (highest quality internal grade may be indicated as 1)
1/AAA or equivalent
4…
N
b) Weighted average rating of the pool
requirements.object: 1/AAA or equivalent 4… N b) Weighted average rating of the pool

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Geographical distribution of loan pools (statewise) (%)
State 1
State 2
State 3
State 4
* The above format should be considered as a baseline disclosure.
requirements.object: baseline disclosure

requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the
product characteristics and market expectation, adequate disclosure, in addition to
items mentioned above, must be made to reflect the true picture of securitised pools
at all times.
requirements.object: the true picture of securitised pools at all times
